description: IV thrombolytic (IVT) eligibility criteria for telestroke LLM extraction demo. Each criterion is a target for the LLM to extract from a note. The LLM should NOT compute eligibility itself -- it only fills in 'value' and 'evidence' per criterion. A separate deterministic rules engine (mirroring MDCalc logic) computes the final eligible/ineligible result from these values.

inclusion_criteria.label: Clinical diagnosis of ischemic stroke causing neurological deficit
Time of symptom onset (or last known well) < 4.5 hours

absolute_contraindications.label: Moderate to severe traumatic brain injury within 14 days
Acute spinal cord injury within 3 months
Severe coagulopathy (INR >1.7, aPTT >40s, or PT >15s)
absolute_contraindications.notes: IVT may be initiated before labs return if no clinical suspicion for coagulopathy

relative_contraindications.label: DOAC exposure within 48 hours
relative_contraindications.notes: Key extraction target -- anticoagulation status, not AFib history itself, is what gates IVT

relative_contraindications.label: Major non-CNS trauma in last 14 days to 3 months
STEMI within last 3 months
relative_contraindications.notes: Individual risk/benefit discussion and emergent cardiology consultation

relative_contraindications.label: STEMI within past several days
relative_contraindications.notes: Risk of hemopericardium; emergent cardiology consultation

relative_contraindications.label: STEMI concurrent with AIS
relative_contraindications.notes: Consider dose appropriate for cerebral ischemia + emergent cardiology consultation

field_definitions.id: short unique key used in code
field_definitions.label: human-readable criterion text shown in UI
field_definitions.value: yes | no | unknown -- filled in by the LLM after reading the note
field_definitions.evidence: exact quote/snippet + location from the note supporting the value, or null if unknown
field_definitions.notes: optional clinical context shown to the clinician
